Localization.Description: Access to file id2entry.db containing domain users' data

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started utility {subject.process.name} and accessed file id2entry.db containing domain users' data on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} started utility {subject.process.name} and accessed file id2entry.db containing domain users' data on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to access file id2entry.db containing domain users' data on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to access file id2entry.db containing domain users' data on host {event_src.host}
